@for (cell of cellData; track $index) { @switch (cell.type) { @case (gridCellType.checkboxText) {
{{ entity[cell.key!] }}
} @case (gridCellType.readonlyDate) {
@if (cell.useCustomPipe) { {{ entity[cell.key!] | dynamic : datePipe : (cell.formatDatePipe ? (settingHelperService.getDate() ? [cell.formatDatePipe] : dateFormat) : []) }} } @else { {{ entity[cell.key!] | date: (cell.formatDatePipe ? cell.formatDatePipe : dateFormat) }} } @if (entity[cell.key!] && cell.showTimeZone) { {{ currentTZ.currentTz?.Abr }} } @if (cell.tooltipInfo) { @if ( !cell.tooltipInfo.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.tooltipInfo.condition : entity) ) { } }
} @case (gridCellType.readonlyText) {
{{ entity[cell.key!] || entity[cell.key!] === 0 ? entity[cell.key!] : '' }} @if (cell.tooltipInfo) { @if ( !cell.tooltipInfo.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.tooltipInfo.condition : entity) ) { } }
@if (cell.additionalInfo) { @for (addInfo of cell.additionalInfo; track $index) { @if (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: addInfo.condition : entity) {
{{ addInfo.displayText.constructor.name === 'Function' ? (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: addInfo?.displayText : entity) : addInfo.displayText }}
} } }
} @case (gridCellType.empty) {
} @case (gridCellType.delete || gridCellType.deleteSubRow) {
@if (!cell.condition || (!!cell.condition && updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.condition : row)) { }
} @case (gridCellType.editText) {
@if (!cell.condition || cell.condition(row)) {
@if (cell.iconName) {
} @if (cell.tooltipInfo) { @if ( !cell.tooltipInfo.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.tooltipInfo.condition : entity) ) { } }
}
} @case (gridCellType.date) {
@if (!cell.condition || cell.condition(row)) {
@if (cell.tooltipInfo) { @if ( !cell.tooltipInfo.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.tooltipInfo.condition : entity) ) { } }
}
} @case (gridCellType.counter) {
@if (cell.tooltipInfo) { @if ( !cell.tooltipInfo.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.tooltipInfo.condition : entity) ) { } }
} @case (gridCellType.customView) {
} @case (gridCellType.dropDown) {
@if (!cell.condition || cell.condition(row)) {
@if (cell.iconName) {
} @if (cell.tooltipInfo) { @if ( !cell.tooltipInfo.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: cell.tooltipInfo.condition : entity) ) { } }
}
} } }
